lockhart.name: Dr. Lockhart
lockhart.title: The Doctor with a Fractured Mind
lockhart.tagline: There you are, Patient. Right on time. Now tell me your affliction.
lockhart.biography:
Lockhart is a Plague Doctor themed VTuber who streams a variety of content. His main focus is game streaming, but you'll also find him doing language study, reaction content, and exploring the lore of his favourite games.

When you tune in, you'll either be greeted by the friendly Doctor or his more unhinged other side — but that's down to the choice of his dear patients. His goal is to create a community where anyone can hang out and not be afraid to let their 'Other' side show.

So tune on in, take a seat. The Doctor will see you soon.
lockhart.lore:
Dr. Sean Lockhart is one of The Order's most skilled doctors, known for saving the hamlet of Black Hollow that was doomed to be cremated. His success allowed him to take part in The Rite of Binding earning him the Mask of the White Raven, a sacred omen not seen since the founding days of The Order.

A mask that carries admiration from the people but has the power to shake the hierarchy of The Order itself. Accompanied by his loyal companion Poe, Lockhart wanders this plague stricken land to heal and protect his beloved patients from the horrors that remain unseen, and to uphold the ideals of an Order that has lost its way and grows more corrupt by the day…

…though those that have spent time around the doctor swear that his reflection does not always match the man who casts it.

recommendedVideos.title: Would you trust Lockhart with your boba?

data.dream: Provide a safe place for all my patients
catchphrases: Get that apple away from me
data.regularStreams: Tilted Tuesdays, 日本語の勉強, Freaky Friday
data.hobbies: Journaling, Collecting Feathers, Brewing Herbal Remedies, Stargazing, Collecting Small Oddities
data.likes: Fresh Tea, Orderly Workspaces, Old Music Boxes, Herbal Scents, Poe
data.specialSkills: Plague Diagnostics, Silent Movement, High Emotional Regulation

other.name: The Other
other.title: The Doctor with a Fractured Mind
other.tagline: Don't be shy, Patient. Come closer, let me get a closer look.
other.biography: Lockhart is a Plague Doctor themed VTuber who streams a variety of content. Game streaming, language study, reactions, lore discussions… blah blah blah, you know he calls all these 'important intellectual pursuits.' But, we know he just loves playing games. 'When you tune in, you'll either be greeted by the friendly Doctor or his more unhinged other side.....' Unhinged? Rather harsh if you ask us. We prefer 'honest'. Yes, yes we are the one he calls The Other, but don't worry dear Patient. We are not here to ruin the place. The Doctor built this little community so people could relax, laugh, and enjoy themselves without pretending to be perfect. Turns out people are much more entertaining when they stop trying to hide parts of themselves. So take a seat, patient. We are sure we'll see you soon...
other.lore:
The Other came into existence the night Lockhart’s serum fractured his mind, a second self that indulges in everything the Doctor denies himself. 

The Other protects their precious patients with a passion that borders obsession, stopping at nothing to keep their hearts beating. Slipping in and out of control over Lockhart’s body whenever the doctor’s spirit weakens, through exhaustion, emotion, or on the rare occasion, permission. 

Whispers have begun to circulate within The Order that the White Raven does not work alone.

data.dream: To keep every patient alive, no matter the cost.
catchphrases: My, aren't you a lovely disaster
Don't flinch, this is my favourite part
Try not to die on me, it would ruin my night
data.regularStreams: Tilted Tuesdays, 日本語の勉強, Freaky Friday
data.hobbies: Annotating Lockhart's Journals, Mixing Potent Concoctions, Studying Poe, Admiring their Reflection, Night Walks in Plague Filled Towns
data.likes: Strong Tea with Too Much Honey, Chaotic Workspaces, The Smell of Alcohol and Iron, Their Own Voice, Poe
data.specialSkills: Unrestrained Adaptability, Rapid Reflexes, Pain Tolerance
